title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 294.141 - Notice of transmissions by division
text:
294.141.  Notice of transmissions by division. — The records of the division shall constitute prima facie evidence of the date of transmission of any notice, determination or other paper transmission pursuant to the provisions of this chapter.
(L. 1995 H.B. 300 & 95 § 294.140 merged with H.B. 414 § 294.140, A.L. 2002 S.B. 923, et al.)
